steps.t: Nasar has asked you to bring up the Corsairs' predicament with Lord Sirgon. Sirgon's manor is located in the north-west corner of East Pelargir.
A guard has gestured for you to stop. You should talk to him outside Sirgon's East Pelargir manor.
Celebros seems interested in hearing what you have to say. You should talk to her about Nasar's request outside Sirgon's East Pelargir manor.
